reviews.comment:
Es increíble q en una estación de servicio tengas q pagar para cargar aire, bajar del auto para q te vendan la ficha!! Antes estaba siempre roto, ahora q lo arreglaron , te cobran

It's unbelievable that at a gas station you have to pay to get air conditioning, get out of your car to buy the token! It used to always be broken, now that they've fixed it, they charge you.
